text: There is a sense of intrigue in this space, full of glowing light and stark lines. The tilted perspective disorients me, challenging my perception—am I a visitor or a participant in an experiment? The reflection of neon in glass and the emptiness of the room evoke a futuristic solitude, like I am witnessing the birth of innovation behind closed doors. I feel a mixture of curiosity and mild apprehension, eager to learn but wary of the unknowns that hide in luminous corners.
